title: stelis multirostris
intro: Stelis multirostris, also known as the Stelis Antillean orchid, is a species of orchid endemic to the Caribbean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. Stelis multirostris has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Stelis multirostris can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to benefit from its health benefits, including antioxidant and immune-boosting effects.
